items.title: Judge halts Trump effort requiring colleges to show they don't consider race in admissions
items.standfirst: A federal judge on Saturday said the Trump Administration the demand to collect data from universities was rolled out in a "rushed and chaotic" manner.
items.content: A federal judge on Saturday said the Trump Administration the demand to collect data from universities was rolled out in a "rushed and chaotic" manner.(Image credit: Alex Brandon)

items.title: Federal judge halts White House effort to collect university data on applicants’ race
items.standfirst: Trump ordered data collection after raising concern about race being used as factor in college admissionsA federal judge on Friday halted efforts by the Trump administration to collect data that proves higher education institutions aren’t considering race in admissions.The ruling from the US district court judge F Dennis Saylor IV in Boston granting the preliminary injunction follows a lawsuit filed earlier this month by a coalition of 17 Democratic state attorneys general. It will only apply to public universities in plaintiffs’ states. Continue reading...
items.content: Trump ordered data collection after raising concern about race being used as factor in college admissionsA federal judge on Friday halted efforts by the Trump administration to collect data that proves higher education institutions aren’t considering race in admissions.The ruling from the US district court judge F Dennis Saylor IV in Boston granting the preliminary injunction follows a lawsuit filed earlier this month by a coalition of 17 Democratic state attorneys general. It will only apply to public universities in plaintiffs’ states. Continue reading...

items.title: Judge halts Trump effort requiring colleges show they don't consider race
items.standfirst: The ruling follows a lawsuit filed earlier this month by a coalition of 17 Democratic state attorneys general.
items.content: The ruling follows a lawsuit filed earlier this month by a coalition of 17 Democratic state attorneys general.

ai_summary: Federal judge halts Trump administration effort

items.title: US says it has arrested relatives of late Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
items.standfirst: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.
items.content: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.

items.title: Top diplomat Marco Rubio strips Qassem Soleimani’s niece of US residency
items.standfirst: In a statement, the US State Department has accused Hamideh Soleimani Afshar of being an 'outspoken supporter' of Iran.
items.content: In a statement, the US State Department has accused Hamideh Soleimani Afshar of being an 'outspoken supporter' of Iran.

items.title: US authorities arrest relatives of late Iranian military commander who were living in Los Angeles
items.standfirst: State department said niece and grandniece of Qassem Soleimani, killed in 2020 US drone strike, celebrated attacks against US soldiersUS federal agents have arrested the niece and grandniece of the late Iranian military commander Qassem Soleimani after the Trump administration’s top diplomat, Marco Rubio, revoked their lawful permanent resident status, officials said on Saturday.“Hamideh Soleimani Afshar and her daughter are now in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement,” or ICE, the state department said in a statement. Continue reading...
items.content: State department said niece and grandniece of Qassem Soleimani, killed in 2020 US drone strike, celebrated attacks against US soldiersUS federal agents have arrested the niece and grandniece of the late Iranian military commander Qassem Soleimani after the Trump administration’s top diplomat, Marco Rubio, revoked their lawful permanent resident status, officials said on Saturday.“Hamideh Soleimani Afshar and her daughter are now in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement,” or ICE, the state department said in a statement. Continue reading...

ai_summary: Niece and grandniece of Qasem Soleimani arrested
US Immigration and Customs Enforcement holds them
State department accuses niece of supporting Iran
Relatives had lawful permanent resident status revoked
Arrests made after Trump administration decision

clusters.title: Russian attack on Ukraine market kills five
clusters.neutral_headline: Russian Drone Strike Kills Five In Ukraine

items.title: Russian attack on Ukraine market kills five
items.standfirst: A Russian drone hit a busy spot in the southern Ukrainian town on Saturday morning, injuring another 21 people.
items.content: A Russian drone hit a busy spot in the southern Ukrainian town on Saturday morning, injuring another 21 people.

items.title: Russian drone strike on Ukrainian market kills five, Moscow intensifies attacks
items.standfirst: A Russian drone hit a covered market in the eastern Ukrainian city of Nikopol on Saturday, killing five people and injuring 30 others, according to Ukrainian officials. The Ukrainian air force said Russia fired 286 drones overnight, of which 260 were intercepted.
items.content: A Russian drone hit a covered market in the eastern Ukrainian city of Nikopol on Saturday, killing five people and injuring 30 others, according to Ukrainian officials. The Ukrainian air force said Russia fired 286 drones overnight, of which 260 were intercepted.

ai_summary: Russian drone hits Ukrainian market
Five people killed and many injured in attack
Ukrainian air force intercepts Russian drones
Russia intensifies attacks on Ukraine
Conflict between Russia and Ukraine escalates

items.title: Medicines watchdog to investigate UK peptide clinics over health claims
items.standfirst: Exclusive: Guardian investigation finds several clinics making potentially unlawful claims about benefits of unregulated therapiesWhat are peptides, are they safe and is there evidence to back up the hype?The medicines regulator is investigating whether UK clinics are breaking the law by making claims about the benefits of unregulated, experimental peptide therapies, the Guardian can reveal.Interest in experimental peptides has boomed in recent years. The substances are delivered by injection and are touted by sellers, influencers and even some medics as aiding everything from anti-ageing to recovery from injury. Continue reading...
items.content: Exclusive: Guardian investigation finds several clinics making potentially unlawful claims about benefits of unregulated therapiesWhat are peptides, are they safe and is there evidence to back up the hype?The medicines regulator is investigating whether UK clinics are breaking the law by making claims about the benefits of unregulated, experimental peptide therapies, the Guardian can reveal.Interest in experimental peptides has boomed in recent years. The substances are delivered by injection and are touted by sellers, influencers and even some medics as aiding everything from anti-ageing to recovery from injury. Continue reading...

items.title: What are peptides, are they safe and is there evidence to back up the hype?
items.standfirst: Influencers and athletes are among those claiming substances can help with injury repair, weight loss and angi-ageingMedicines watchdog to investigate UK peptide clinics over health claims From influencers to athletes, high-profile figures are hailing peptides as the route to wellness, claiming they help with injury repair, weight loss, anti-ageing and mood. We take a look at what these substances are, and the murky industry surrounding them. Continue reading...

clusters.title: Burkina Faso must 'forget' about democracy, military leader says
clusters.neutral_headline: Burkina Faso Leader Says Forget Democracy

items.title: Burkina Faso must 'forget' about democracy, military leader says
items.standfirst: Capt Ibrahim Traoré, who seized power in 2023, says democratic rule would not work for his country.
items.content: Capt Ibrahim Traoré, who seized power in 2023, says democratic rule would not work for his country.

items.title: People of Burkina Faso should forget about democracy, says military ruler
items.standfirst: Ibrahim Traoré, who took power in 2022 coup, tells state broadcaster ‘we must tell the truth, democracy isn’t for us’People in Burkina Faso should forget about democracy as it is “not for us”, the military president, Ibrahim Traoré, told the country’s state broadcaster.Traoré took power in a coup in September 2022, toppling another junta that had taken power just nine months earlier. He has since stifled opposition and in January banned political parties outright. Continue reading...
items.content: Ibrahim Traoré, who took power in 2022 coup, tells state broadcaster ‘we must tell the truth, democracy isn’t for us’People in Burkina Faso should forget about democracy as it is “not for us”, the military president, Ibrahim Traoré, told the country’s state broadcaster.Traoré took power in a coup in September 2022, toppling another junta that had taken power just nine months earlier. He has since stifled opposition and in January banned political parties outright. Continue reading...

ai_summary: Military leader says democracy not suitable
Ibrahim Traoré took power in coup
Opposition and political parties banned
Leader claims democracy not for Burkina Faso
Country under military rule
